|   | Activity                       |
|---| ------------------------------ |
| 👋 | Intro                          |
| 💬 | Anatomy of a conversation      |
| 💻 | Programming with LLMs          |
| ✍️  | Prompt engineering             |
| ☕ | Break                          |
| 🛠️  | Tool calling                   |
| 🔍 | querychat                      |
| 🤖 | Coding agents & Posit Assistant |
| 🌳 | Privacy, security, & wrap-up   |
